summary.narrative: Watson prioritizes housing affordability, transportation infrastructure, public safety, and homelessness. Secured HOME Phase 1&2 land use reforms (2023-2024) to increase housing supply. Background: 13 yrs Texas Senate, 30 yrs public policy experience.
summary.grade_rationale: Strong initiation on housing reform (HOME Phase 1&2 passed); transportation/police staffing underway. Limited evidence on homelessness outcomes, land preservation funding status unclear. Implementation phase ongoing.

promises.normalized: Reform land use code and increase housing supply via HOME initiative
Fill empty Austin Police Department positions and improve public safety
Address homelessness and launch Austin Infrastructure Academy

data_gaps: Status of $78M land preservation funding campaign
Measurable homelessness reduction metrics and timelines
Transportation funding sources and bond measure details
Police hiring completion rate and recruitment timeline
HOME Phase 2 implementation outcomes and unit projections
Child care facility exemption policy specifics and impact
Austin Infrastructure Academy enrollment and placement data
